news.t: Defiance Launches LMNX: The First 2X Long ETF for Lemonade, Inc.

holdings.infoBox: LMNX is an equity ETF with a total of 11 individual holdings. The top holdings are US DOLLARS stock at 66.73%, Lemonade Inc Swap Cs at 38.47%, Lemonade Inc Swap Marex at 35.09%, Lemonade Inc Swap Cantor at 34.86%, and Lemonade Inc Swap Jnst-L at 34.60%.

overview.description: The Defiance Daily Target 2x Long LMND ETF (LMNX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in financials equity. The fund seeks to deliver 2x leveraged exposure to the daily share price movement of Lemonade, Inc. (LMND), net fees and expenses, through derivatives like swap agreements. LMNX was launched on Oct 15, 2025 and is issued by Defiance.

data.title: Defiance Launches LMNX: The First 2X Long ETF for Lemonade, Inc.
data.text: MIAMI, Oct. 16, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Defiance ETFs is proud to announce the launch of the  Defiance Daily Target 2X Long LMND ETF (Ticker: LMNX) , expanding its suite of single-stock leveraged ETF...
